name: Stick Hero
description: How far can you go? Stick Hero : Tap, Hold and Release the stick and see How far can you go with our little Hero. Challenge your friends or Share and Invite your friends. Be at the top of the leaderboard.
instructions: 1 Hold to stretch the stick in the hand of Hero 2 Release hold when you think stick height is enough to reach next block
tags: 1 Player, 2D, Arcade, Casual, Hypercasual, Stickman, Superhero
